_comment: Edit this file to update the Claude Pro page. The daily agent auto-updates fields marked with auto_update=true.

exec_summary.lead: Claude Pro is being used to increase productivity and quality of D&A area management. In {days} days, {total} initiatives were configured covering documentation, governance, automations and development tools.
bullets: Team management: knowledge base with OKRs, plans and history for all 5 direct reports
Governance: OKRs reviewed and consolidated; corporate structure mapped
Productivity: presentations generated automatically in the visual standard
Documentation: technical processes documented as practical guides (OPLs)
Automation: meeting transcription and note-saving fully running; English Coach integrated
Development: local AI apps (Backlog Toolkit + Toilet Paper diagram generator) built and active
Visibility: this report — updated automatically every morning

active.title: Claude Pro Report — Native Streamlit Page
active.boss: This very page — rendered natively in Streamlit, driven by JSON, auto-updated every morning. Goal: make Claude Pro usage and value visible to stakeholders.
active.advance: Fully integrated into TechColab Backlog App as a native page. No external HTML or GitHub Pages dependency.
active.body: Live page rendering directly from claude-pro-data.json and claude-pro-timeline.json.
bullets: Native Streamlit page — no static HTML, no external URL
Daily agent updates timeline and backlog stats at 8am
Auto-refreshes on first page load each day; manual 🔄 Refresh button available

active.title: Call Recorder — Transcription & Obsidian Vault Integration
active.boss: Automatic recording and transcription system for meetings and 1:1s, generating structured notes. Goal: eliminate manual effort of recording meetings.
active.advance: Fully integrated: notes auto-saved to vault at Team/{Person}/1on1/. English Coach mode with AI-rated pronunciation and grammar assessment added.
active.body: Recording/transcription pipeline integrated with the Obsidian vault and English Coach.
bullets: Stack: Python 3.13 + faster-whisper (CPU, int8)
Full vault integration: notes saved to Team/{Person}/1on1/ automatically
English Coach: AI-rated pronunciation and grammar assessment (Win+Space)

active.title: Personal Toolkit · Techco.lab — Backlog Management App
active.boss: Local productivity app built with Streamlit, integrated with Obsidian vault and daily agent. Centralises idea backlog, to-do management, weekly team brief, bug tracking and Claude Pro report.
active.advance: App in production with 39 backlog items (27 active · 4 open bugs). Dark mode, kanban, filters, bug tracking, Claude agent and Claude Pro report integrated.
bullets: Streamlit + Obsidian vault + daily agent at 8am
Backlog with kanban, dark mode, filters, bug tracking and per-idea to-dos
Weekly team brief with OKR and 1:1 tables
Claude Pro report served locally — no external dependency

active.title: Toilet Paper — Local Napkin AI Clone
active.boss: Local app that converts free text into diagrams (Flowchart, Sequence, Mindmap, ER) via Ollama LLM. No cloud dependency, no API keys. Goal: visualise ideas and processes instantly.
active.advance: Core features shipped and stable. Custom SVG renderer for flowcharts (dagre). 91 tests passing. Techco.lab design system applied.
active.body: Vite+React+Mermaid+Ollama local app for text-to-diagram generation.
bullets: Vite 4 + React 18 + Tailwind + Mermaid.js 10 + @dagrejs/dagre
Custom SVG renderer for flowcharts — reliable with llama3.2:3b
Two-strategy JSON parser — handles all known llama3.2 output formats
91 tests passing · Techco.lab design system applied

completed.title: Claude Pro Setup & Onboarding
completed.boss: Initial Claude Pro environment setup for corporate use. Prerequisite for all other initiatives.
completed.advance: Environment ready and operational from day one.
completed.body: Installation, requirements assessment and Microsoft 365 integration mapping.
bullets: Installation ticket (Claude Desktop App via MSIX)
Features mapped: Computer Use, Projects, MCP
Integration assessment with Power Automate and Teams

completed.title: Obsidian Vault — Second Brain for D&A Management
completed.boss: Digital knowledge base integrated with Claude. Replaces scattered notes with a centralised system automatically accessible by Claude.
completed.advance: All 5 direct reports have OKRs, plans and 1:1 history recorded and accessible to Claude.
completed.body: Obsidian Vault integrated with Claude Code as a persistent knowledge base.
bullets: PARA structure: Inbox, Projects, Areas, Resources, Archive, AI, Templates, Team
Individual profiles for 5 direct reports with OKR, 1:1, PDI and Overview
obsidian-second-brain skill with 25 slash commands installed

completed.title: D&A Team OKR Assessment & Consolidation
completed.boss: Using Claude to review OKRs, find inconsistencies and generate ready-to-report texts — without manual rework.
completed.advance: Standardised documentation for all 4 active direct reports, ready for meetings.
completed.body: Analysis, correction and consolidation of the OKR matrix for 4 active members.
bullets: Critical KR status review with inconsistency identification
Clean report texts generated for stakeholder reporting
Structured records in vault (OKR.md per direct report)

completed.title: Techco.lab Deck Skill — Branded Presentations
completed.boss: Tool that allows Claude to create presentations in the Techco.lab/NETZSCH standard automatically — no manual formatting.
completed.advance: Claude generates slides and .pptx with the correct visual identity from natural language.
completed.body: Proprietary deck generation skill for the Techco.lab/NETZSCH standard.
bullets: Output: web deck (Vite + React + Tailwind) or .pptx
Classification levels: Internal Use Only, Confidential, Strictly Confidential

completed.title: Knowledge Base — NETZSCH Corporate Structure
completed.boss: Complete NETZSCH group mapping available as permanent context — Claude knows who is who without being reminded each session.
completed.advance: 50+ entities from all BUs documented and accessible.
completed.body: Extraction and organisation of corporate structure in Obsidian vault.
bullets: All BUs: A&T, G&D, P&S, Holding
50+ entities with code, full name and BU
Resources/NETZSCH/General.md with change log

completed.title: One-Point Lesson — Power Platform Deployment
completed.boss: Documentation of the process for publishing Power Platform solutions from test to production — previously relied on one person's tacit knowledge.
completed.advance: 9-step guide ready. Any team member can execute without asking for help.
completed.body: Structured documentation for Power Platform deployment (Test → Prod).
bullets: 9 steps with video reference timestamps
Key notes: unmanaged solution, Upgrade option, connections for service users

tools: Main interface. Windows-MCP, document generation, vault management.
Obsidian vault operations, automations, slash commands (/obsidian-*).
Persistent knowledge base: OKRs, 1:1s, PDIs, session logs.
Web and .pptx presentation generation with Techco.lab visual identity.
Backlog management with daily agent, dark mode, dashboard and Claude Pro report integrated.
Win+Space recorder: 1:1s and English Coach sessions auto-saved to vault.
Local text-to-diagram app: free text → Flowchart / Sequence / Mindmap / ER. No cloud dependency.
Read/write local files, PowerShell execution via Claude Desktop.
